_comment: Genericized example. Copy to .claude/settings.json and replace the <PLACEHOLDER> reminder text with your project's recurring failure modes.

hooks.command: input=$(cat); cmd=$(echo "$input" | python3 -c 'import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get("tool_input",{}).get("command",""))' 2>/dev/null); if echo "$cmd" | grep -Eq '(^|[;&|[:space:]])git[[:space:]]+commit([[:space:]]|$)'; then echo 'REMINDER: run the /pre-commit skill before every commit. If you have not already run it this session, stop and run it now. Do not bypass.' >&2; fi; exit 0

cat <<'EOF'
<system-reminder>
Before non-trivial edits to existing code: produce an Investigation Report per CLAUDE.md "Maintenance change protocol".

<PROJECT-SPECIFIC RECURRING DRIFT TO AVOID — replace with your own one or two most common failure modes, e.g.:>
- <Footgun #1: the wrong pattern, then the right one.>
- <Footgun #2: ...>
</system-reminder>
EOF
